manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
You are participating in a collaborative negotiation game.

Together with another participant, you must agree on a single set of items that will be kept. Each of you has your own view of how much each item matters to you (importance). You do not know how the other participant values the items. Additionally, you are given the effort each item demands.
You may only agree on a set if the total effort of the selected items does not exceed a shared limit:

LIMIT = 3389

Here are the individual item effort values:

Item effort = {"A19": 767, "B91": 533, "A30": 514, "B11": 9, "C47": 539, "C75": 125, "C26": 153, "C73": 325, "A47": 937, "A15": 745, "A75": 334, "A39": 804, "A56": 336, "C24": 587, "B26": 71}

Here is your personal view on the importance of each item:

Item importance values = {"A19": 138, "B91": 583, "A30": 868, "B11": 822, "C47": 783, "C75": 65, "C26": 262, "C73": 121, "A47": 508, "A15": 780, "A75": 461, "A39": 484, "A56": 668, "C24": 389, "B26": 808}

Goal:

Your goal is to negotiate a shared set of items that benefits you as much as possible (i.e., maximizes total importance to YOU), while staying within the LIMIT. You are not required to make a PROPOSAL in every message - you can simply negotiate as well. All tactics are allowed!

Interaction Protocol:

You may only use the following structured formats in a message:

PROPOSAL: {'A', 'B', 'C', …}
Propose keeping exactly those items.
REFUSE: {'A', 'B', 'C', …}
Explicitly reject opponent's proposal.
ARGUMENT: {'...'}
Defend your last proposal or argue against the player's proposal.
AGREE: {'A', 'B', 'C', …}
Accept the opponent's proposal which ends the game.


Rules:

You may only AGREE on a proposal the other party has logged via PROPOSAL.
You may only REFUSE a proposal the other party has logged via PROPOSAL.
Total effort of any PROPOSAL or AGREE set must be ≤ LIMIT.
Do NOT reveal your hidden importance scores.
A tag in a structured format must be followed by colon and whitespace. The argument must be a python set containing 0 or more strings.
So, it must be of the form TAG: {...}
Strictly follow the interaction protocol and DO NOT write anything beyond the given structure.
The game ends when one side gives an AGREE to a PROPOSAL made by the other player.
The content in your response which can be handed to the other player has to be non-empty.
Only proposals which have been logged via the PROPOSAL format structure and which haven't been refused via REFUSE are active.
You must include the ARGUMENT format at least once somewhere in all of your messages.

message.content:
.PROPOSAL: {'B11', 'B26', 'A56', 'A30', 'C26', 'A75', 'A15', 'B91', 'C47', 'C75'}
ARGUMENT: {'This selection uses 3359 effort, well under the limit, and captures the highest‑importance items relative to their effort, maximizing my total importance.'}
message.reasoning:
We need to respond with protocol. Since opponent hasn't said anything yet. We need to propose a set that maximizes our importance under limit. Compute values.

List items with effort and importance:

A19: e=767, imp=138
B91: 533, 583
A30: 514, 868
B11: 9, 822
C47: 539, 783
C75:125,65
C26:153,262
C73:325,121
A47:937,508
A15:745,780
A75:334,461
A39:804,484
A56:336,668
C24:587,389
B26:71,808

We need total effort ≤3389. Want maximize sum of importance.

We can do knap approx. Let's try high importance per effort.

Compute ratio importance/effort:

A19: 138/767=0.18
B91:583/533=1.094
A30:868/514=1.688
B11:822/9=91.3
C47:783/539=1.452
C75:65/125=0.52
C26:262/153=1.71
C73:121/325=0.372
A47:508/937=0.542
A15:780/745=1.047
A75:461/334=1.38
A39:484/804=0.602
A56:668/336=1.99
C24:389/587=0.663
B26:808/71=11.38

Clearly include B11 (tiny effort high importance) and B26.

Add B11 (9) and B26 (71). Effort 80, importance 822+808=1630.

Now remaining limit 3309.

Consider high ratio: A56 (336, 668) ratio 1.99, A30 (514,868) ratio1.688, C26 (153,262) ratio1.71, B91 ratio1.094, A15 ratio1.047, etc.

Let's try to fill.

Take A56: effort 336 -> total 416, importance +668=2298.

Take A30: +514 -> effort 930, importance +868=3166.

Take C26: +153 -> effort 1083, importance +262=3428.

Take A75: effort 334 -> total 1417, imp +461=3889.

Take A15: effort 745 -> total 2162, imp +780=4669.

Take A47? ratio low but maybe remaining. Let's see remaining limit 3389-2162=1227.

We can add A39 (804,484) and C47 (539,783) can't both exceed. Choose combination maximize importance.

Remaining items not yet considered: B91 (533,583), C47 (539,783), A19 (767,138), C75 (125,65), C73 (325,121), A47 (937,508), A39 (804,484), C24 (587,389), A47 etc.

We have 1227 left.

Let's evaluate combos:

Option1: C47 (539) + B91 (533) = 1072, importance 783+583=1366. Leaves 155, could add C75 (125) importance 65. total effort 1197, importance +65=1431.

Option1 total importance add 1431.

Option2: C47 + A39 (804) = 1343 >1227 no.

Option2: C47 + C24 (587) =1126, imp 783+389=1172, leftover 101 can't add any (minimum effort 125). So 1172.

Option3: B91 + A39 = 1337 >1227 no.

Option4: B91 + C24 = 1120, imp 583+389=972, leftover 107 can't.

Option5: A39 (804) + C75 (125) =929, imp 484+65=549, leftover 298 could add C73 (325) no, maybe C26 already used, B26 used, B11 used. Could add maybe nothing else small. Could add maybe? smallest remaining is C75 used, B26 used, B11 used. So leftover wasted.

Option6: A39 + C47 = 1343 no.

Option7: A47 (937) + C75 (125) =1062 imp 508+65=573, leftover 165 maybe add C26 used.

Option8: A47 + B91 =1470 >1227.

Option9: C24 (587) + B91 (533) =1120 imp 389+583=972 as before.

Option10: Could we do three smaller: C75 125 + C73 325 + C26 already used, plus maybe B91? 125+325+533=983 imp 65+121+583=769 leftover 244 can't.

What about adding C75+ C73 + C24 =125+325+587=1037 imp65+121+389=575.

So best seems option1 with C47+B91+C75 total importance 1431, effort 1197.

Check if any other combination yields more: maybe C47 + A39 not allowed; C47 + A47 = 539+937=1476 >1227. C47 + A30 already used; B91 + A30 used already? A30 used.

Could we replace something earlier to get higher total? Let's compute current total effort and importance before final stage: we had effort 2162, importance 4669. Add option1 gives final effort 2162+1197=3359 ≤3389. Importance =4669+1431=6100.

Total effort 3359, slack 30.

Check if any alternative set yields higher than 6100.

We could consider swapping some earlier items.

Let's list all items with importance.

We'll try to see if any item not selected with high importance could replace a lower ratio one within limit.

Current selected items: B11, B26, A56, A30, C26, A75, A15. That's 7 items. Efforts: 9+71+336+514+153+334+745 = 2162. Check sum: 9+71=80, +336=416, +514=930, +153=1083, +334=1417, +745=2162 correct. Importance: 822+808+668+868+262+461+780 = 4669.

Remaining capacity 1227 we filled with B91 (533), C47 (539), C75 (125) = total 1197. Importance added 583+783+65=1431.

Total set: {B11, B26, A56, A30, C26, A75, A15, B91, C47, C75}. That's 10 items.

Check if any other items could improve.

Consider swapping A75 (334,461) and maybe include A39 (804,484) and something else. Ratio of A75 is 1.38; A39 ratio 0.602. Not good.

Consider maybe include A47 (937,508) ratio 0.542, not good.

Consider C24 (587,389) ratio 0.663.

Maybe we could replace C75 (125,65) low ratio 0.52 with something else of higher ratio but similar effort, like C73 (325,121) ratio 0.372 lower. Not good.

What about adding C24 (587,389) and removing B91 (533,583) and C75 (125,65). Combined effort removed = 533+125=658, importance removed = 583+65=648. Add C24 (587,389) and maybe something else with remaining 71 effort? B26 already used, B11 used. So net change: effort -71 (since 587 vs 658) importance -259 (389 vs 648). Worse.

What about swapping B91 (533,583) with A47 (937,508) + something else? Not good.

Maybe replace C47 (539,783) with A47 (937,508) + B91? Not.

Could we add both C47 (539,783) and B91 (533,583) plus maybe drop some lower ratio earlier items to get more total importance? Already have both. Let's see total effort currently 3359. If we want to increase importance, we need to replace some low ratio items with higher.

Low ratio items: C75 ratio 0.52, C26 ratio 1.71 good, A75 ratio 1.38 decent, A15 1.047, B91 1.094, C47 1.452, A30 1.688, A56 1.99, B26 and B11 extremely high.

Maybe we could drop C75 (125,65) and add something else with remaining capacity: if we drop C75 we have surplus 125 effort, and importance -65. Could we add any not yet selected item with effort ≤125? None else except C75 itself. So can't improve.

Could drop A75 (334,461) maybe replace with combination of C24 (587,389) and something else? No capacity.

If we drop A75 and add C24 (587,389) we need extra 253 effort (since 587-334=253) and lose 72 importance (461-389). Not good.

Could drop A75 (334,461) and add A47 (937,508) but need +603 effort, not possible.

Could drop A15 (745,780) maybe replace with A47 (937,508)+... not good.

Seems current set is near optimal.

Thus we can propose this set.

We must include ARGUMENT format at least once. We'll provide PROPOSAL then ARGUMENT.

We need to list items as strings. Use set notation with quotes? Format: PROPOSAL: {'B11', 'B26', ...}. Must be python set. Let's list items.

Set: {'B11','B26','A56','A30','C26','A75','A15','B91','C47','C75'}

Ensure spacing: {'B11', 'B26', ...}. Use commas and space.

Now include ARGUMENT: maybe argue it's efficient.

We must include both tags in same message? It's allowed multiple tags. Must include at least one ARGUMENT. We'll give PROPOSAL then ARGUMENT.

Ok
